lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
The car is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible damage to both the exterior and interior. It requires major repairs to be roadworthy.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. It serves as a reliable daily driver with an engine that starts reliably and a transmission that shifts smoothly. While there are some minor signs of normal use, such as small surface scratches or light wear on the interior upholstery, the overall appearance is clean and professional. The tires have plenty of tread left, and all major systems are functioning as they should. It is a solid, dependable car ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver for those prioritizing function over perfection. The exterior shows typical signs of age, including several visible scratches, minor door dings, and some clear coat thinning on the upper surfaces. Inside, the cabin exhibits moderate wear and some staining on the seats, though it remains comfortable and all electronics are operational. It is a solid, honest car that has been driven regularly and priced according to its cosmetic state.

Discover a great deal on a car that's ready for its next chapter! This vehicle is in fair condition, showing some honest character and signs of use, but it remains a dependable choice that gets the job done. It's a fantastic opportunity to get on the road with a reliable performer at a budget-friendly price!
This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are functional and perform reliably.

This impeccably maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of refined performance and proven reliability. Extensively vetted by our technical team, the automobile exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic profile. We invite you to experience a vehicle that upholds the rigorous standards of its class, offering both prestige and long-term value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road and is ready for its next big adventure, this is definitely the one! Come take it for a spin and see how smoothly it handles—you're going to love it!

Offered is a mechanically robust E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. This example retains its factory-spec Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and M Variable Differential Lock, ensuring tactile engagement and precise power delivery. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and subframe reinforcement to maintain structural rigidity. The suspension remains taut with refreshed bushings, while the cross-drilled rotors provide consistent thermal management under load. While the aesthetics reflect its status as a dedicated driver’s tool, the powertrain remains a testament to high-revving naturally aspirated engineering. A turn-key performance machine for the discerning purist.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in excellent running order, reflecting true pride of ownership. The exterior boasts a lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections typical of careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the premium upholstery shows minimal wear, and every feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity audio system—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is sound, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with all service records available. It drives smoothly, handles precisely, and the tires offer significant remaining life. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example perfect for a discerning buyer looking for high quality and reliability.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and performance. It serves as a premier selection for those who prioritize proven reliability and sophisticated engineering in their next automotive investment.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliability and sustained value. This specimen has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and aesthetic integrity. It offers a balanced synthesis of mechanical soundness and premium comfort, making it an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver. Experience a vehicle that transitions seamlessly from executive commutes to weekend excursions with poise and confidence.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly in such great shape! It’s been super well-maintained, runs like a charm, and is ready for all your upcoming adventures. I’ve loved every mile in this car, and I’m sure you will too. It's the perfect daily driver—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This meticulously cared-for vehicle strikes the ideal balance between performance and value. The exterior finish presents beautifully, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible ownership and careful highway driving. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free, well-preserved interior where every button, dial, and safety feature operates flawlessly. It has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets high standards of reliability and comfort. This is a dependable, high-quality option for a discerning driver who appreciates a car that has been treated with respect and attention to detail.

Hey there! If you’re looking for a reliable ride that’s been really well-loved, you’ve found it! This car has been my trusty companion and is still in great shape for its next adventure. It runs super smoothly, looks sharp, and has tons of life left in it. I’ve taken care of it, and it definitely shows! It's perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46-generation M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. Mechanically sorted, the vehicle has received critical preventative maintenance including rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul to ensure peak volumetric efficiency. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential, maintaining excellent corner-exit traction. The chassis remains composed with upgraded poly-bushings and Bilstein dampers, offering sharp turn-in and communicative steering feedback. While the aesthetics reflect its use as a spirited driver, the drivetrain is robust, with consistent compression across all cylinders and a linear power band that pulls strongly to the 8,000 RPM redline.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-maintained, reliable driver. The exterior finish remains vibrant, showing only light, honest wear consistent with careful ownership and regular detailing. Inside, the interior is clean and inviting; the seats offer excellent support with no significant tears or stains, and all electronic components—from the infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—are fully operational. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and shifts effortlessly, backed by a consistent service history that ensures peace of mind for the road ahead. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the braking is firm and responsive. It’s a solid, dependable car that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. It stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains a premier choice for those seeking a high-caliber driving experience at an advantageous price point.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained over the years—definitely ready for a new home! It runs like a dream and is perfect for anyone looking for a reliable, great-looking car for their daily commutes or weekend trips. I'd love for it to go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have, so come take it for a spin!
